name: 白日飞升
overview: After being torn apart by the will of heaven on their wedding day, immortal king Su Wubing and celestial Lin Ningxue are cast into endless reincarnation. A thousand lifetimes later, Su Wubing awakens in the modern world with his memories intact, just as Lin Ningxue is being forced into marriage to save her father. Determined to change their fate, Su Wubing must defy both mortal forces and the laws of fate itself to reclaim their love and  break the cycle that binds them.
